section_miscategorizations.text: A cat scan of the lungs and a pulmonary function test have been ordered.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Orders for imaging and tests belong in the Plan section, not in Objective, which should contain results of tests or completed procedures.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor orders a cat scan of the lungs.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed in the Plan, but it duplicates the miscategorized order statement in the Objective section, which may cause organizational confusion.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor orders a pulmonary function test.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed in the Plan, but it duplicates the miscategorized order statement in the Objective section, which may cause organizational confusion.
